text:
<https://portscout.freebsd.org/gnome@freebsd.org.html> shows 5.14.2. 

Use case: Tuba, <https://tuba.geopjr.dev/>

gmake fails, 

> meson.build:84:20: ERROR: Dependency lookup for gtksourceview-5 with 
> method 'pkgconfig' failed: Invalid version, need 'gtksourceview-5' 
> ['>=5.6.0'] found '5.4.2'.

Thanks
